app.safetyNotice: Running generated code locally still carries risk. Use an isolated container for production experiments.

bootstrap.title: Local research service failed to start
bootstrap.hint: Quit and reopen Agentic Research. In development, inspect the sidecar logs in the Tauri terminal.

dashboard.title: Research Workflow Overview
dashboard.description: See actual run states, holdout metrics, and decision gates instead of inferring progress from file existence.
dashboard.directionPlaceholder: Example: reliability of few-shot medical image segmentation
dashboard.reviewHint: By default, execution pauses before experiments so you can review the plan and generated code.
dashboard.empty: No research runs yet. Create a research direction or run {{command}} to verify the local environment.

ideas.title: Research Hypotheses
ideas.description: Only hypotheses that pass novelty, feasibility, falsifiability, and evidence review appear here.
ideas.empty: No research hypotheses match the current filter.

papers.title: Research Reports
papers.description: Reports are tied to real validation records. Results that fail a gate are explicitly marked unvalidated, invalid, or inconclusive.
papers.empty: No research reports have been produced yet.

logs.title: Run Logs
logs.description: Clearing removes logs only from this view; audit records on disk remain intact.

providers.title: Model Providers
providers.description: Supports OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, and Google Gemini. Keys are stored only in the local .env file and are never returned in plaintext.
providers.baseUrl: Base URL (leave blank for the official endpoint)
providers.apiModeHint: The official GPT-5.6 endpoint recommends Responses. Select Chat Completions only for gateways that expose /v1/chat/completions.
providers.apiKey: API key (leave blank to keep the current value)
providers.replaceKey: Configured; enter a new value to replace it

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: The backend validates seed isolation, threshold ranges, and resource limits when saving. An active scheduler restarts automatically to apply changes.
settings.savedRestarted: Settings saved and continuous scheduling restarted
settings.reviewProvider: Review model provider (blank uses generation model)
settings.allowNetwork: Allow experiment code to access the network

stream.parseFailed: Failed to parse run status data
stream.disconnected: The live status connection was lost. You can still refresh the page manually.

errors.approvalOnly: Only a run awaiting review can be approved
errors.completedCannotCancel: A completed run cannot be cancelled
errors.noNewlines: Configuration values cannot contain line breaks
